COMMSNR SUE KAPLAN; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W CNSL ROSSOFF. NEITHER DEFT PRESENT. COMPLT AMEND TO ADD AKA OF ROCKY HANES TO CONFORM TO ANSWER. PLTF PRESENTS ORAL & DOCMT EVID. CT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS, DEFAULT HAVING BEEN ENTERED AGAINST DEFT FORQUER EARLIER THIS MORNING, & NOTICE OF TIME/PLACE OF TRIAL HAVING BEEN MAILED 5/21/98.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HINES, ROCKY FORQUER, SUZANNE HANES, ROCKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 511 SCOTT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,761.44 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,211.44, LEASE FORFEITED, THERE IS NO AWARD OF COSTS.
